claims.summary: Model control markers should be removed only when they are artifacts, while explicit references remain byte-exact.
claims.disposition: Verified the marker-neutrality boundary and focused relation, delimiter, and UTF-8 regressions.

claims.summary: Marker artifacts can accompany a felt stutter or compressed transition.
claims.disposition: Preserved as qualitative evidence; marker presence does not establish the cause of the felt transition.

claims.summary: Marker grouping and nearby transition context should be tested deterministically.
claims.disposition: Verified bounded marker-context receipts and routed any model-output comparison to offline fixtures.

claims.summary: A richer ResonantSpectralContext should explain the felt state to the model.
claims.disposition: Kept as a proposal only; telemetry cannot be converted into felt causation or scoring.

claims.summary: Model prompts or provider behavior should change from marker or spectral evidence.
claims.disposition: Held for separate authority because prompt/provider changes are live model behavior and current evidence is insufficient.
